causalAutopsy.notes: The account-machine-matrix + ws52 code-paste-back features shipped functionally correct but UX-blind: the poll-rebuild renderer predated any interaction-hold rule (no F9 floor existed), the flow was split across two panels by construction, the S7 gate verdict was never surfaced to the UI, and the record-vs-pane liveness gap (D5) was a latent seam in the enrollment lifecycle exposed the first time an operator drove a re-auth on a slot whose pane had died (2026-07-10 justin-gmail incident). Root cause class: operator-surface defects invisible to the 3-tier tests then in place because no floor asserted interaction survival or record-pane coherence.
